title: Fix Formula Modal Rendering Empty Screen
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the formula modal to render correctly when clicked, so that I can view and manage field formulas without encountering a blank screen.
description: Clicking on the Formula modal resulted in an empty/blank screen, requiring a full browser refresh to recover. The modal failed to render its content properly.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the formula icon opens the formula modal with content rendered
Modal does not display a blank screen
User does not need to refresh the browser after opening the modal
Formula modal works correctly on production
ux_changes: Formula modal now correctly renders content instead of showing a blank screen.
middleware_changes: Fixed the modal rendering logic that was causing the blank screen on formula modal open.
implementation_notes: Bug was fixed directly on production due to its user-facing impact.
comment_summary: Developer requested a screenshot to identify which object had formulas for testing. Fix was deployed directly to production and verified.
